MUCHIEVOUSTENDENCY
Some children are very mischievous and they are a cause
of tremendous nuisance to their elders and others. Instead of
blaming and punishing them, it is essential to guide them properly
in a pious and patient manner, we have seen that some children,
who in their childhood were mischievous, became greatest men

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 7
in the world, in the subsequent sojourn oftheir life. So, if suitable
opportunity, guidance and advice, is given, such children may
become very useful citizens.
PLANETARY COMBINATIONS:-Combination of Mars.
Mercury and Sun, while Jupiter is aspecting these planets or when
Jupiter is
aspecting Mars and Mercury, results in such mischievous
